comment: GenLoss — tape/VHS generation-loss degradation (Chase Bliss Gen Loss / Shallow Water vibe). Wow & flutter pitch warble, bandwidth loss (low-pass + sub roll-off), tape saturation, hiss, and random dropouts/warble. Desktop preview implements the full DSP; pedal C port is staged.
fxid_comment: 0x01C8. Above the repo's used range; distinct from the other customs. Verify uniqueness before flashing.

params.name: Wow
params.comment: Wow & flutter depth — slow + fast pitch warble.

params.name: Tone
params.comment: Bandwidth / brightness. Low = dark worn tape, high = open.

audio_nop_comment: Pedal C port starts as a UI-only smoke build; full DSP validated on desktop first.
